mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_WORK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_WORK (ID, WORK_NAME, WORK_START) VALUES (#{id}, #{workName}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(WORK_START,'HH24:MI:SS') > '09:00:59' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_LATE FROM TBL_WORK WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(WORK_END,'HH24:MI:SS') > '18:00:00' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS IS_LEAVE_EARLY FROM TBL_WORK WHERE TO_CHAR(WORK_START,'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{workStart} AND WORK_NAME = #{workName} AND WORK_END IS NOT NULL
